/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/HelloWorld_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/helloworld_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_HelloWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/HelloWorld_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/HelloWorld_main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelloWorld.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_HelloWorld_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o HelloWorld  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
